hooks.command:
echo '## Code Enhancement Pipeline

Agents available:
- @planner (Opus) — analyze codebase, design tasks, write execution guide
- @executor (Sonnet) — apply code changes from guide, verify after each task
- @verifier (Haiku) — run tests, validate changes, produce reports

Skills: plan-execute, task-batch, verify-and-report, execution-handoff, cost-tracker

Typical flow: plan → batch → execute → verify
Or just say what you want to improve and the agents will coordinate.'

hooks.prompt: The @executor agent just finished. Check if it reported any failures. If all tasks passed, suggest handing off to @verifier for a final comprehensive check. If any tasks failed, summarize the failures and suggest next steps.
